query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sector IS NOT NULL AND sector != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_sector,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sector IS NULL OR sector = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_sector
FROM stocks;

  SUM(CASE WHEN sector IS NULL OR sector = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_sector
